data.content: Implementation review rejected. Two issues: (1) docs/audit/beats-usage-inventory.md and docs/audit/workflow-operations-map.md incorrectly ADD checkPromptGuidance() references — this function does not exist in the codebase and the knot goal is to remove prompt guidance, not document it. Remove these added lines. (2) Commit bundles ~1900 lines of unrelated changes (history-debug-panel deletion, changesets.yml workflow, screenshot swaps, README overhaul, unrelated test deletions). The actual prompt-guidance removal in doctor.ts and PROMPT*.md deletions is correct.
